# Feature Brief Template

## Problem

What user problem are we solving?

## User segment

Who needs this most?

## Success metric

How will we know it works?

## User flow

Step-by-step flow.

## Data impact

What data is created, updated or deleted?

## Tax/compliance impact

Does this affect tax records, calculations, documents or HMRC-facing data?

## AI impact

Does this use AI? If yes, what are the guardrails?

## Edge cases

List ambiguous and failure scenarios.

## Definition of done

Checklist.
